/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX10.15.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/SDL_test.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o SDL_test   -L/Users/kion/projects/SDL_Test/SDL_Test/src/main.cpp  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/kion/projects/SDL_Test/SDL_Test/src/main.cpp -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib ../CoconutEngine/libCoconutEngine.a /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.28.3/lib/libSDL2main.a /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.28.3/lib/libSDL2.dylib /usr/local/lib/libfmt.10.1.0.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2_image/2.6.3_2/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib
